queries.query:
query collections($limit: Int, $offset: Int, $order_by: [collections_order_by!]!, $where: collections_bool_exp) {
  items: collections(
    limit: $limit
    offset: $offset
    order_by: $order_by
    where: $where
  ) {
    banned_at
    banner
    contract_address
    created_at
    deleted_at
    description
    feature
    id
    logo
    metadata
    minter_address
    name
    owner_address
    slug
    social_link_telegram
    social_link_twitter
    standard_contract_id
    symbol
    type
    updated_at
    website
    collection_stats(where: {duration_type: {_eq: "all"}}) {
      volume
      total_nfts
      total_owners
      __typename
    }
    owner {
      banned_at
      __typename
    }
    __typename
  }
  total: collections_aggregate(order_by: $order_by, where: $where) {
    aggregate {
      count
      __typename
    }
    __typename
  }
}

usersStores
queries.query:
query usersStores($address: String = "") {
      users (where: {aura_address: {_eq: $address}}){
        aura_address
        avatar
        id
        name
        updated_at
        created_at
        deleted_at
        cover_picture
      }
      stores(where: {owner_address: {_eq: $address}}) {
        id
        contract_address
        created_at
        description
        extra_information
        owner_address
        standard_contract_id
        status
        subdomain
        title
        updated_at
      }
    }

nftListing
queries.query:
query nftListing($tokenId: String = "") {
      listings(where: {nft: {token_id: {_eq: $tokenId}}}, order_by: {updated_at: asc}) {
        auction_config
        buyer_address
        contract_address
        created_at
        seller_address
        status
        store_address
        token_id
        updated_at
        latest_price
      }
    }

queries.name: nftOfferByOfferer
queries.query:
query nftOfferByOfferer($token_id: String = "", $contract_address: String = "", $offerer_address: String = "") {
      offers(where: {token_id: {_eq: $token_id}, contract_address: {_eq: $contract_address}, offerer_address: {_eq: $offerer_address}}, order_by: {created_at: asc}) {
        contract_address
        created_at
        end_time
        id
        price
        status
        store_address
        token_id
        updated_at
        offerer_address
      }
    }

queries.name: nftOfferList
fromCollection
queryOffersReceived
getCollectionStatsByType
queries.query:
query getCollectionStatsByType($durationType: String = "all", $contractAddress: String = "") {
      collection_stats(where: {duration_type: {_eq: $durationType}, contract_address: {_eq: $contractAddress}}) {
        id
        floor_price
        duration_type
        created_at
        contract_address
        listed_nfts
        prev_volume
        volume
        updated_at
        total_owners
        total_nfts
        sales
      }
    }

queries.name: collectionDetail
queries.query:
query collectionDetail($contractAddress: String = "") {
        collections(where: {contract_address: {_eq: $contractAddress}}) {
          banner
          contract_address
          created_at
          description
          feature
          id
          logo
          metadata
          minter {
            aura_address
            avatar
            created_at
            name
          }
          minter_address
          name
          nft_histories {
            block_height
            additional_information
            contract_address
            event
            from_address
            id
            nft {
              name
              metadata
            }
            price
            to_address
            transaction_hash
            transaction_time
          }
          owner_address
          symbol
          type
          updated_at
          social_link_telegram
          social_link_twitter
          website
        }
      }
